arts.ttl: Andrea Cambiaso to Man City: How close are Pep Guardiola's side to signing Juventus full-back?
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso appears to emerge as a top target for Man City, but they may have to wait until the summer to secure his services.

arts.ttl: Cambiaso’s Absence Raises Questions for Juventus: Between Champions League and Transfer Market
arts.sum: Andrea Cambiaso, Juventus' versatile defender, is set to miss the crucial Champions League match against Benfica at the Allianz Stadium. This news, confirmed by coach Thiago Motta during a press conference, comes after Cambiaso was absent from the final training session before the game. arts.sum: Francisco Conceição, Juventus' attacking winger, addressed the media in a press conference on the eve of the crucial match against Benfica. The game, scheduled for tomorrow at the Allianz Stadium, marks the eighth and final matchday of the Champions League League Phase.
